title: Draper Redline 150mm 10 Piece Junior Hacksaw Blades | Carbon Steel Saw Accessories | 32TPI | Metal Cutting Blades | 67821
features: Effective – Build from carbon steel, a stylish and durable addition to your metal working toolkit, ensuring precision and longevity with every cut.
Precision – Offering a blade that is ideal for cutting mild steel or soft nonferrous metal and flawless results.
Versatile – Complete with 5 assorted blades from 32TPI, ensuring you’re equipped for a range of cutting tasks with ease and precision.
description: From the manufacturer Draper About Us We’re an independent family business. It begins with our founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 2019, We celebrate our centenary. Draper is our core range of quality tools which are suitable for enthusiasts and tradespeople alike. Draper Redline 67821 Junior Hacksaw Blades,Blue ,150 mm General purpose cutting blades with pinned ends. Will fit all junior hacksaw frames. Packed ten blades per display card. This comprehensive and growing range includes tools to tackle most tasks. Every Draper Redline tool is manufactured to high that are strictly controlled by the companies quality control engineers. Draper Tools is a family owned company that has been selling high quality tools in the United Kingdom and beyond since 1919.
